title: Mild Smoky Russian Fish Broth
description: A light yet smoky fish broth inspired by Russian cuisine, perfect for a brunch or light dinner.
instructions: In a medium pot, combine water, diced onion, chopped celery, sliced carrot, and bay leaf, and bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, add smoked paprika, and simmer for 10 minutes to infuse the broth.
Gently fold in the fish pieces, cover, and poach for 6-7 minutes until the fish flakes easily.
Remove the pot from heat, strain the broth through a fine sieve, discarding solids.
Season the broth with salt and black pepper to taste, stirring gently.
Return the strained broth to a low simmer, swirl in chopped fresh dill, and let it warm for 2 minutes.
Serve the broth hot in bowls, garnished with a fresh lemon wedge for brightness.
Enjoy the smoky, airy broth as a light brunch or early lunch.
